title: Junior Business Development Manager at BHIVE Workspace

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at BHIVE Workspace
jsonLd.description:
BHIVE Workspace, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BHIVE Workspace:
BHIVE Workspace is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BHIVE Workspace!
